# @nimiq-faucet/react

React hooks over `@nimiq-faucet/sdk`.

```tsx
import { useFaucetClaim } from '@nimiq-faucet/react';

const { claim, status, txId, error } = useFaucetClaim({
  client: { url: process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_FAUCET_URL! },
  address,
  hostContext: { uid: hashedUid, kycLevel: 'email' },
});
```

Other hooks:
- `useFaucetStatus(client, id)` — polls `/v1/claim/:id`.
- `useFaucetStream(client, onEvent)` — subscribes to `WS /v1/stream`.

`client` can be either a pre-built `FaucetClient` or the options to construct one; the hook memoizes.
